Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.ExecutableException

Packages that use ExecutableException
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.commons.bean
Bean-modeling layer for Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect
Comprehensive reflection utilities for working with classes, methods, fields, constructors, and annotations in a more convenient and type-safe way than the standard Java reflection APIs.
org.apache.juneau.commons.utils
Common internal utilities.
org.apache.juneau.marshall
Marshalling API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
BSON (Binary JSON) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson
Hjson (Human JSON) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon
HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
HTML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini
INI format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
RDF Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5l
JSON5L (JSON5 Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonl
JSONL (JSON Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi
OpenAPI Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser
Parser API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext
Plaintext Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap
Swap API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.toml
TOML v1.0.0 serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon
UON Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding
URL-Encoding Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml
XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml
YAML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.microservice
Microservice API

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean that throw ExecutableException
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    T
    BeanMeta.newBean(Object outer)
    Creates a new instance of this bean.
    abstract T
    BeanInfo.newInstance()
    Creates a new instance of this class.

  • Uses of ExecutableException in org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect that throw ExecutableException
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    V
    Property.get(T object)
    Gets the value from the specified object using the producer (getter).
    <T> T
    MethodInfo.invoke(Object obj, Object... args)
    Shortcut for calling the invoke method on the underlying method.
    Object
    MethodInfo.invokeLenient(Object pojo, Object... args)
    Invokes the specified method using lenient argument matching.
    Object
    ClassInfo.newInstance()
    Shortcut for calling Class.getDeclaredConstructor().newInstance() on the underlying class.
    <T> T
    ConstructorInfo.newInstance(Object... args)
    Shortcut for calling the new-instance method on the underlying constructor.
    <T> T
    ConstructorInfo.newInstanceLenient(Object... args)
    Shortcut for calling the new-instance method on the underlying constructor using lenient argument matching.
    void
    Property.set(T object, V value)
    Sets the value on the specified object using the consumer (setter).

  • Uses of ExecutableException in org.apache.juneau.commons.utils

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.utils that return ExecutableException
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static ExecutableException
    Shorts.exex(String m, Object... a)
    Creates an ExecutableException with a formatted message.
    static ExecutableException
    Shorts.exex(Throwable t)
    Creates an ExecutableException wrapping a cause.
    static ExecutableException
    Shorts.exex(Throwable t, String m, Object... a)
    Creates an ExecutableException with a cause and formatted message.

  • Uses of ExecutableException in org.apache.juneau.marshall

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall that throw ExecutableException
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    T
    ClassMeta.newInstance()
    Create a new instance of the main class of this declared type.
    T
    ClassMeta.newInstance(Object outer)
    Same as ClassMeta.newInstance() except for instantiating non-static member classes.
    T
    ClassMeta.newInstanceFromString(Object outer, String arg)
    Create a new instance of the main class of this declared type from a String input.
